---
title: '`syncweaver templates add`'
---

Copy a named bundled workflow template into the `.github/workflows/` directory
(or a custom output directory) of the current repository.

## Usage

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from ccbr_tools.shell import shell_run

help_text = shell_run("syncweaver templates add --help")
print("```")
print(help_text)
print("```")
```

## Examples

```sh
# List available templates first
syncweaver templates list

# Add a specific template to the default output location
syncweaver templates add sync-update

# Add to a custom directory
syncweaver templates add sync-update --output-dir .github/workflows
```
